description: Add killer micro-features to quantmail (email app) and quantsync (social feed). For quantmail: smart inbox categories, email snooze, undo send timer, email templates, signature builder. For quantsync: infinite scroll feed manager, post scheduling, analytics dashboard service, content suggestions engine, bookmark collections.
steps: Create apps/quantmail/src/services/smart-inbox.service.ts - SmartInboxService with categorize(email) using rules-based categorization into Primary, Social, Promotions, Updates, Forums. Support custom rules

Create apps/quantmail/src/services/email-snooze.service.ts - EmailSnoozeService with snooze(emailId, until), unsnooze(emailId), getScheduled(). Support relative times (later today, tomorrow, next week)
Create apps/quantmail/src/services/undo-send.service.ts - UndoSendService with send(email, delayMs), cancel(sendId), getQueuedSends(). Default 10s cancel window
Create apps/quantmail/src/services/email-templates.service.ts - EmailTemplateService with create, update, delete, list, apply(templateId, variables). Support variables like {{name}}, {{company}}
Create apps/quantmail/src/services/signature-builder.service.ts - SignatureBuilderService with create, update, setDefault, render(signatureId). Support HTML signatures with image, links, social icons
Create apps/quantsync/src/services/feed-manager.service.ts - FeedManagerService with loadPage(cursor), refresh(), getNextPage(). Cursor-based pagination with deduplication and seen-tracking
Create apps/quantsync/src/services/post-scheduler.service.ts - PostSchedulerService with schedule(post, publishAt), cancel(id), getScheduled(), update(id, changes). Timezone-aware scheduling

Create apps/quantsync/src/services/analytics.service.ts - AnalyticsService with getPostMetrics(postId), getProfileMetrics(timeRange), getEngagementRate(), getTopPosts(limit). Return impressions, clicks, shares, saves

Create apps/quantsync/src/services/content-suggestions.service.ts - ContentSuggestionsService with getSuggestions(topic), getTrendingTopics(), getOptimalPostTime(). Return content ideas based on engagement history

Create apps/quantsync/src/services/bookmarks.service.ts - BookmarksService with addToCollection(postId, collectionId), createCollection(name), removeFromCollection(), getCollection(id), listCollections()
Create vitest tests for all new services
acceptance_criteria: 10 new service classes with full TypeScript typing
vitest tests for each service covering happy paths and edge cases
All files pass tsc --noEmit with strict mode
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run apps/quantmail/src/__tests__/ apps/quantsync/src/__tests__/
Run tsc on the new files to verify compilation
